caption: A man with a beard and headphones sits before a professional microphone on a boom arm, positioned against a dark, ribbed acoustic foam wall. He wears a white shirt and looks toward the camera. Across the sequence, several smaller video windows appear over his shoulder, showing different scenes. First, a woman in a dark floral top and a man in a maroon shirt are shown indoors; the woman holds a white mug. Then, the scene shifts to a man in a blue quilted vest outdoors in a grassy yard, drinking from a black cup. Finally, a window shows a woman laughing in a car, followed by a shot of three people outdoors in a wooded area. One man wears a tan sweater and another wears a maroon shirt, and they are raising glasses in a toast. Small icons and text appear at the bottom of the final window, including "Herbal Powder Cost," "BPA Free," and "Does Not Toast."
